groundstation.config.CfnAbout:
Creates a `Config` with the specified parameters. 

 Config objects provide Ground Station with the details necessary in order to schedule and execute satellite contacts.

groundstation.config.ConfigData.Description: Object containing the parameters of a config. Only one subtype may be specified per config. See the subtype definitions for a description of each config subtype.

groundstation.config.Name.Description: The name of the config object.
